stories.title: Shohei Ohtani Hits 300th Career Home Run — A Legend-Status Moment
stories.angle: Arriving at MLB All-Star Week at Citizens Bank Park as the game's biggest star — one week after cementing legend status.

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Shohei Ohtani hit his 300th career home run last night.

Leading off. 409 feet to center. No. 20 this season.

First Japanese-born player in MLB history to reach 300.

5th fastest ever — behind Judge, Kiner, Howard, and Gonzalez.

#MLB #Dodgers #Ohtani

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Ohtani's 300 HR club membership card:

✅ 5th fastest in history (1,121 games)
✅ First Japanese-born player ever
✅ 2nd player to hit No. 300 as a leadoff shot (Steve Finley, 2006)
✅ 20th HR of 2026 season

The game doesn't have a player like this. #MLB #Dodgers

article.headline: Shohei Ohtani Hits 300th Career Home Run: The Legend Keeps Growing

image_concepts.raw:

stories.title: Wheeler's Snub-Fueled Masterpiece — 14 Ks at the All-Star Site
stories.angle: The snub narrative: Wheeler pitches a 14-K gem at the All-Star site, one week before the game is played there without him.

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Last night at Citizens Bank Park — the All-Star site — Zack Wheeler:

→ 14 strikeouts (career high tied)
→ 7 innings
→ 0 walks
→ 104 pitches

Not an All-Star.

The snub just got very awkward. #Phillies #MLB

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
Schwarber also hit his MLB-best 31st homer last night.

At Citizens Bank Park.

The same place hosting the Home Run Derby in 5 days.

The Phillies are absolutely ready for All-Star Week. #Phillies #MLB #HomeRunDerby

article.headline: Wheeler's 14-K Masterpiece at the All-Star Site: The Snub That Became a Statement

stories.title: Home Run Derby — 5 Days Away | Schwarber at His Home Park
stories.angle: Schwarber dominating at home, 31 HRs, potential Derby participant at his own park — a storybook setup.

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Schwarber just hit HR No. 31 — MLB's best — at Citizens Bank Park.

The Home Run Derby is AT CITIZENS BANK PARK in 5 days.

Confirmed Derby field: Caminero (2025 runner-up) and Ben Rice.

Is Schwarber about to go nuclear at his home park on Netflix?

#HomeRunDerby #MLB #Phillies

stories.title: Skubal Trade Watch — 26 Days to August 3
stories.angle: Updated countdown + clarifying the Braves vs. Dodgers prospect comparison.

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
26 days until the MLB trade deadline.

Tarik Skubal: 85% odds traded per ESPN.

The Braves want him. The Dodgers have more prospects.

The Tigers are sellers. The clock is ticking.

Who gets the best pitcher available? #MLB #TradeDeadline #Tigers

stories.title: The White Sox Are Actually in First Place
stories.angle: "Wait, the White Sox are in FIRST PLACE?" — contrast the 2024 collapse with the 2026 resurgence.

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
2024: Chicago White Sox went 41-121.

2026: The White Sox lead the AL Central at 47-42.

One of the most remarkable turnarounds in recent MLB history — and it's happening right now.

#WhiteSox #MLB #ALCentral

article.headline: The White Sox Are in First Place. No, Really.
